body.title: Igor can import and run Claude Code skills as his own tools
body.result: Superseded by T-skill-to-engram-filter + T-skill-to-engram-generalise — split into prove-then-generalise two-pass.
body.description: Claude Code skills (filter, audit, sprint, commit, etc.) live in ~/.claude/skills/ as markdown. Igor should be able to: (1) read the current skill files, (2) import them as runnable PROCEDURAL memories or engrams, (3) execute them via his own tool dispatch. This closes the loop: when Claude updates a skill, Igor picks it up. When Igor runs /filter or /audit himself, he's using the same logic Claude uses. The lever for moving more process into Igor one step at a time.
